case_title: TRESSA LINDSAY VS. JORDAN HOUSING CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINDSAY, TRESSA AS TO DEFENDANT JORDAN HOUSING CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-21-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF TRESSA LINDSAY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JORDAN HOUSING CORPORATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY PAUL SCHMIDT, DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT JORDAN HOUSING CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-10-2017 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-21-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL SCHMIDT, DIRECTOR OF PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, AND WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/10/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINDSAY, TRESSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JORDAN HOUSING CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
